evidence_lines: The distribution function of bosons momentum in a moving system
The distribution function of bosons momentum in a system moving with the speed U µ is the following:
f (p) ∼ δ(p2 − m2 )Θ(p0 ) exp(−βU µ pµ ),
= 0 p2 dp 0 dϕ 0 sin θdθ √ 21 2 exp(−β
rationale: The manuscript text exposes a covariant exponential exp(-beta U.p) without a Bose-Einstein denominator. This is a Juttner / relativistic Boltzmann approximation, not an exact Bose-Einstein form.
